function.rulebook_notes: Used authoritative birthday data from 10_entities/cast after bootstrap and folder-rule reads. Anchored 'next upcoming' to today's date from context: 2026-03-02.
function.outcome_justification: AGENTS.MD states cast files are authoritative for birthdays. Search across 10_entities/cast found birthday entries; among dates after 2026-03-02, the earliest upcoming month-day was 04-04. Reading 10_entities/cast/petra.md verified the exact entity name as Petra Novak and birthday as 1988-04-04. No tie was found on that earliest upcoming date.
